---
title: "calculation.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/calculation.py"
loc: 2
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.95
style_score: 9.19
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 9.26
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating add_numbers. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `add_numbers`
